hours: We're open 6 AM to 9 PM Monday through Friday, and 7 to 7 on weekends.
pricing: Drop-ins are 40 dollars, and our five-class pack runs 180 — best value is the monthly unlimited at 295.
amenities: Yes — full locker rooms, showers, Aesop products, towel service, and filtered water, all on the house.
location: We're at 135 West 20th in Chelsea, between 6th and 7th — the black door right next to the coffee shop.
class_types: We run our signature Ride and Lift on the spin floor, plus Strength and Core classes in the Red Room.
